'''''Mon Mothma''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] of the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] and later the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]], named for [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] leader [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]]. It played a major role in a number of conflicts in the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

==Characteristics==
''Mon Mothma'' was one of the first ''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers to include [[Gravity well projector/Legends|gravity well projectors]]. These new projectors required less power and a streamlined form, removing the characteristic globes of the [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Interdictor cruiser]].

These vessels were distinct from earlier [[Interdictor-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Interdictor Star Destroyers]] such as the [[Dominator (Interdictor-class)|''Dominator'']], which used the basic ''Imperial''-class hull, but had raised globes to contain their gravity well projectors.

==History==
Completed at [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]], ''Mon Mothma'' was one of a group of [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] named after important New Republic leaders.

Shortly after completion, ''Mon Mothma'' formed the heavy line of a fleet commandeered by [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]] to defend the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] on [[Eclipse Station]]. Bel Iblis then took ''Mon Mothma'' and [[Elegos A'Kla (Imperial-class)|''Elegos A'Kla'']] to [[Talfaglio]] against the orders of [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]] High Command to transport Talfaglion refugees. Their use was authorized by [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Borsk Fey'lya]], although this went unknown until after the fleet successfully saved thousands of refugees and protected Eclipse's secrecy.

Following the rescue at Talfaglio, ''Mon Mothma'' returned to Coruscant to protect the capital against the impending [[Yuuzhan Vong]] assault. When the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]] came, ''Mon Mothma'' fought bravely against the [[Extragalactic/Legends|extra-galactic]] fleet, but was forced to retreat when the enemy force proved overwhelming.

The ship joined the New Republic forces regrouping at [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]] under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], and participated in the liberation of the planet. ''Mon Mothma''s heavy guns and gravity well projectors proved essential in staving off waves of Yuuzhan Vong assaults against Borleias until [[Starlancer Project|Operation Starlancer]] could begin, when it fell back to the edge of the [[Pyria system]]. When the battle had progressed long enough for the [[Inner Council (New Republic)|Inner Council]] members to escape, ''Mon Mothma'' [[Precision hyperspace jump|micro-jumped]] back to the planet and engaged the Yuuzhan Vong [[matalok]] until the repaired ''[[Lusankya/Legends|Lusankya]]'' arrived to take over the counter attack.

Antilles then moved his flag to ''Mon Mothma'' and led his fleet to engage the Yuuzhan Vong at [[Duro/Legends|Duro]]. Once again, ''Mon Mothma'' was the center of a ruse to fool the Yuuzhan Vong into over dedicating forces to the [[Duro system/Legends|Duro system]], which were then trapped with its gravity well projectors and destroyed. ''Mon Mothma'' took heavy damage, but was repaired just in time for the formulation of [[Second Battle of Bilbringi|Operation Trinity]]. There, ''Mon Mothma'' took the lead in the point [[Alpha Fleet]] and was forced to take the brunt of the damage when the fleet was cut off from reinforcements. Once again, it underwent repairs at [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]], this time for the remainder of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|war]].

Seven years later, ''Mon Mothma'' fell under the command of [[Commodore/Legends|Commodore]] [[Gavin Darklighter]], another former Rogue, before and during the [[Dark Nest Crisis]]. It was a part of the [[Fifth Fleet (Galactic Alliance)|Fifth Fleet]], under the command of [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Nek Bwua'tu]]. It participated in the blockade of the [[Utegetu Nebula/Legends|Utegetu Nebula]] in [[36 ABY]], just before the start of the [[Swarm War]].

In the engagement marking the beginning of the Swarm War, Admiral Bwua'tu used ''Mon Mothma'' as his flagship after his original flagship, the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Admiral Ackbar (Victory-class)|''Admiral Ackbar'']], was commandeered by [[Raynar Thul|UnuThul's]] and [[Alema Rar]]'s forces during the Fifth Fleet's attempt to destroy the oncoming [[Killik/Legends|Killik]] fleet.
